title: Fire protection district; purposes
doc_html:
§560.  Fire protection district; purposes

The governing authorities of fire protection districts may incur debt and issue bonds of the district for the purpose of acquiring buildings, machinery and equipment, including both real and personal property, to be used in giving fire protection to the property in the districts.
doc_text:
§560.  Fire protection district; purposes
The governing authorities of fire protection districts may incur debt and issue bonds of the district for the purpose of acquiring buildings, machinery and equipment, including both real and personal property, to be used in giving fire protection to the property in the districts.
